pack.name: Basic Project Pack
pack.description: A minimal project pack manifest used to validate the Kaidera OS extension lifecycle contract.

extensions.description: Optional console extension module loaded only when explicitly enabled.

portals.description: Optional thin portal metadata. The package owns branding and UI; Kaidera OS owns auth, permissions, streaming, and replay.

assets.description: Agent prompt or steering text installed for this project only.
Seed knowledge that can be ingested into the selected project scope.
Example package-owned thin portal container context.
Example package-owned Python extension module loaded from the installed pack root.

install.notes: Validation only in this release; install/apply remains explicit operator work.
